known_data_filtering.rule: Never ask customer for information already known internally.

firmware_failed_update_order: normal firmware update retry if scanner boots and is detected
USB stack rebuild only if pure USB enumeration issue persists
SSHomeClean and fresh ScanSnap Home reinstall if software environment issue persists
model-specific recovery gate only if recovery symptoms confirmed
escalation/request template only after troubleshooting exhausted or supporter selects it
